info.title: SNAD CRM API
info.description: Runtime-derived governed CRM v2 API contract for CRM-G2.

IfMatch.name: If-Match
IfMatch.description: Strong ETag required for versioned mutations.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Required for governed idempotent POST operations.

ETag.description: Strong version ETag. Send it back as If-Match on mutations.
